name: Team Rigil - Embarrassing the Legends.
description:
Legends are best served Chopped.

The sixth Umamusume bot in my repertoire.

The situation? Team Rigil's been dominating your team and many others for a bit too long. So now it's up to you to pull a Goku and solo their whole squad. Whether or not you actually throw hands or just race is up to you.

  • Each Uma is accurate(mostly, there's still a few goofs here and there) to real life horse sizes. I've gone over this in other descriptions. Refer to those.

  • You are a vet of the sport in this one. Don't shy away from making a persona, or giving an unused one a whirl if you've made one already but couldn't find a good intro.

  • This is a 1 v 11.(Counting their Trainer.) Have fun. And don't cook these cocky gals too much.

REVAMPED - done 12/13/2025.
creator: Mon3tr007
